implementation_summary: Added fast-check ^3.23.0 to devDependencies in package.json, ran npm install to update package-lock.json (resolves to 3.23.2, 2 packages added, no peer-dep warnings), and added a test-property target to the Makefile. The target is .PHONY, depends on node_modules, sets FAST_CHECK_NUM_RUNS=10000, targets both src/store property test files, uses --passWithNoTests, has a ## doc comment so it appears in make help, and sits between the test and dev targets.

notes.npm_install_warnings: 12 pre-existing audit vulnerabilities (3 moderate, 9 high); no new peer-dep warnings from fast-check
notes.platform_stamp: Linux aarch64 — unchanged after npm install (spec prompt said Linux x86_64 but the actual running host is Linux aarch64; stamp reflects reality)
